# Feature Intake Draft: mve-timeline-ux-polish

<!-- generated by /feature-intake on 2026-07-12 — pre-approved by user, proceeding straight to /implement -->

## Slice 1 (P0) — Scene-Sync UX (faster debounce + live DOM preview)

- `SCENE_SYNC_DEBOUNCE_MS` 800ms → 300ms in `AudioTimelineMveTextBlock.tsx`
- Live DOM-only preview of the pink Structure scene shell width while typing (`data-scene-id` direct style mutation, no ripple/no React state)
- Self-corrects every keystroke from current draft; authoritative width restored after debounced backend sync + query invalidation

## Slice 2 (P1) — In-Scene Horizontal Reorder

- Dropping an MVE text block within its **own** scene (today a no-op) reassigns sequential `orderIndex` for scene siblings based on drop x-position
- Reuses `resolveMveLineVisualSpanMap` for target-index detection and `sortLinesInScene` ordering
- Visual stacking refresh via existing query invalidation (no new rendering path)

## Slice 3 (P2) — Compact Empty Dialog Lane Height

- New `LANE_UI.heightDialogEmpty` tier for character dialog lanes with **zero** MVE lines and **zero** clips
- `resolveLaneHeightPx(laneIndex, expandedLane, hasContent?)` — backward-compatible optional param
- Lanes with content keep `heightDialogCompact` (280px); expanded lanes keep `heightDialogExpanded` (320px)

## Out of scope (unchanged)

- Cross-scene move (`moveTextBlockToScene`) — unchanged behavior
- Film `structureDriven` scene policy
- ms-tick timeline refactor
- Live insertion marker for in-scene reorder (existing `dragOverSceneId` highlight only)
